mapper.sql: id, username, password, phone, email, created, updated, sex, orderid, creditcard, lzxiantag, ywxbj, age, health, cardtype, updatetag, userid,policymemberid, comment, parentid, relation
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_member
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_member (id, username, password, phone, email, created, updated, sex, orderid, creditcard, lzxiantag, ywxbj, age, health, cardtype, updatetag, userid,policymemberid, comment, parentid, relation) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{policymemberid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{relation,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into tb_member
id,
username,
password,
phone,
email,
created,
updated,
sex,
orderid,
creditcard,
lzxiantag,
ywxbj,
age,
health,
cardtype,
updatetag,
userid,
policymemberid,
comment,
parentid,
relation,

#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update tb_member
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{record.created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sex = #{record.sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
creditcard = #{record.creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lzxiantag = #{record.lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxbj = #{record.ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER},
age = #{record.age,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
health = #{record.health,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cardtype = #{record.cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updatetag = #{record.updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
policymemberid = #{record.policymemberid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
comment = #{record.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parentid = #{record.parentid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
relation = #{record.relation,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update tb_member set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created = #{record.created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sex = #{record.sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, creditcard = #{record.creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lzxiantag = #{record.lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxbj = #{record.ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER}, age = #{record.age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, health = #{record.health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cardtype = #{record.cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updatetag = #{record.updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, policymemberid = #{record.policymemberid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, comment = #{record.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parentid = #{record.parentid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, relation = #{record.relation,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tb_member
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
creditcard = #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lzxiantag = #{lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxbj = #{ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER},
age = #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
health = #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cardtype = #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updatetag = #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
policymemberid = #{policymemberid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parentid = #{parentid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
relation = #{relation,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_member set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, creditcard = #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lzxiantag = #{lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxbj = #{ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER}, age = #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, health = #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cardtype = #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updatetag = #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, policymemberid = #{policymemberid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parentid = #{parentid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, relation = #{relation,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
